title: McFadden's Flats
writer: Arthur Caesar, Gus Hill, Edward Kaufman
actors: Walter C. Kelly, Andy Clyde, Richard Cromwell
plot: Dan McFadden builds an apartment house in a working-class neighborhood on New York's East Side called "McFadden's Flats." At the same time, Dan and his wife Nora send their tomboyish daughter Molly to an expensive girls' school to...
